name: snyk_breakability_check
description: Runs a breaking change assessment for a package version upgrade.

package_name.description: The name of the package to look up. For scoped npm packages, include the scope (e.g., '@angular/core'). For Maven packages, use 'groupId:artifactId' format.

package_version_from.description: The specific version of the package to look up. This is the version before the upgrade.

package_version_to.description: The specific version of the package to look up. This is the version after the upgrade.
